prospect_data.name: Marcus Johnson
prospect_data.bio: API architect and performance enthusiast. Building scalable systems that don't break at 3am.
recent_activity: Reduced API latency by 60% using connection pooling
Migrated our monolith to microservices - lessons learned
Published article on API versioning best practices
Mentoring junior engineers on system design
prospect_data.company_description: TechCorp AI builds enterprise AI infrastructure solutions, helping companies deploy and scale ML models in production.

generated_outputs.email:
is the rewritten message:

Subject: Explore CortexReach for Efficient Cold Outreach

Marcus,

I came across TechCorp AI's 60% API latency reduction using connection pooling. As a Lead Backend Engineer with expertise in Node.js, GraphQL, and PostgreSQL, I'm familiar with the importance of optimizing performance.

I think you'll appreciate our product, CortexReach, which uses offline LLMs to generate highly personalized messages across multiple channels (Email, WhatsApp, SMS, LinkedIn, Instagram). It can save 10+ hours per week on manual prospect research, increase response rates by 3-5x with hyper-personalization, and scale outreach without sacrificing message quality.

I'd like to schedule a quick call to explore how CortexReach can help you optimize your cold outreach efforts. Are you available for a 15-minute conversation this week?

Best regards,
